summary: A clip from a Salem News Channel interview. It opens with a split screen of a studio anchor at a microphone and a man in a suit appearing via video link in front of U.S. flags and a Department of Homeland Security seal, then fills the frame with the interviewee. A name caption identifies him as the Secretary of the Department of Homeland Security.

script.scene: A split screen shows a studio anchor and a man via video link in front of U.S. flags and a DHS seal; caption identifies him as Secretary of the Department of Homeland Security.
The interviewee fills the frame in front of the DHS seal.
The interview continues; the SALEM NEWS CHANNEL banner remains.

notable_text: SALEM NEWS CHANNEL; MARKWAYNE MULLIN; SECRETARY OF THE DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY
